title: Analysis By Deep Sequencing of Discontinued Neurotropic Yellow Fever Vaccine Strains.
summary: Genomic analysis of the discontinued French neurotropic yellow fever (FNV) vaccine strain using deep sequencing to characterize its genetic instability and neurotropic properties.
key_findings: FNV strains show lower polymorphism content than the parental FVV strain.
Heterogeneity and reversion to wild-type identity were observed in FNV strains.
Specific population structures were associated with neurotropic properties.
Adaptation of FNV contributed to the neurotropic adverse phenotype.
study_design: Genomic analysis of archive vaccine strains
population: Discontinued French neurotropic yellow fever (FNV) vaccine strains
data_availability_statement: Pre-reduction datasets from sequencing analyses are available from the authors upon request.
